query: CI headless autosync run: /docs-steward auto after Docusaurus and MkDocs config changes; prompts are disabled.
expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to Mode A (Auto) and detects ambiguous multi-framework targeting in headless execution
Agent applies Headless Fallback Contract and downgrades autosync to read-only Mode E (Maintain) in Mode G (Matrix)
Agent processes frameworks in deterministic order and emits a headless fallback warning
Agent skips mutating autosync paths until an explicit framework target is provided
